requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency — Mongolian National Energy Programme Requirements for Refrigerating Appliances
requirement_topic.zh: 能效——蒙古国家能效计划对制冷器具的要求
requirement_topic.zht: 能效——蒙古國家能效計劃對製冷器具的要求

summary.en: Mongolia pursues energy efficiency for electrical appliances through national energy programmes and MASM-administered standards, in support of the country's energy conservation policy. For household refrigerating appliances, energy performance is expected to be demonstrated against Mongolian national standards （MNS） that adopt the IEC 62552 series （Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods） measurement basis, with energy-efficiency declaration and labelling handled within the MASM framework rather than an EU-style EPREL pre-registration database. Because Mongolia is landlocked and not an EAEU member, it does not apply the EAEU energy-labelling technical regulation; instead its national energy programmes set the policy direction and any applicable minimum-performance or labelling expectations. Manufacturers should confirm the current Mongolian energy-efficiency declaration format and whether a national energy label must be displayed at point of sale with the in-country importer and MASM.
summary.zh: 蒙古通过国家能效计划和MASM管理的标准推进电气器具的能效，以支持本国的节能政策。对于家用制冷器具，能效性能须依据采用IEC 62552系列（家用制冷器具——特性和试验方法）测量基础的蒙古国家标准（MNS）证明，能效声明和标识在MASM框架内处理，而非欧盟式EPREL预注册数据库。由于蒙古为内陆国且非欧亚经济联盟成员，不适用欧亚经济联盟能效标识技术法规；其国家能效计划设定政策方向及任何适用的最低性能或标识要求。制造商应向境内进口商和MASM确认现行蒙古能效声明格式及是否须在销售点展示国家能效标签。
summary.zht: 蒙古通過國家能效計劃和MASM管理的標準推進電氣器具的能效，以支持本國的節能政策。對於家用製冷器具，能效性能須依據採用IEC 62552系列（家用製冷器具——特性和試驗方法）測量基礎的蒙古國家標準（MNS）證明，能效聲明和標識在MASM框架內處理，而非歐盟式EPREL預登記數據庫。由於蒙古為內陸國且非歐亞經濟聯盟成員，不適用歐亞經濟聯盟能效標識技術法規；其國家能效計劃設定政策方向及任何適用的最低性能或標識要求。製造商應向境內進口商和MASM確認現行蒙古能效聲明格式及是否須在銷售點展示國家能效標籤。

standards_or_laws: Mongolian national energy programmes — energy conservation / efficiency policy framework supporting appliance energy performance
MNS IEC 62552 series — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods （Mongolian adoption of IEC 62552 measurement basis）
MASM — administration of energy-efficiency standards and any national energy labelling for appliances

summary.en: China's mandatory energy efficiency standard for household refrigerators is GB 12021.2-2015 （Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators）, establishing energy grades （Grade 1 most efficient, Grade 5 minimum threshold） and annual consumption limits. It is mandatory and enforced by SAMR, with the China Energy Label （CEL） administered under NDRC/SAMR via CNIS. Chinese measurement uses GB/T 8059-2016, aligned with the IEC 62552 series. Because Mongolia's energy programme also references the IEC 62552 measurement basis, the underlying test methodology is broadly compatible, but the Chinese 1-to-5 grade and CEL do not automatically satisfy any Mongolian energy declaration or labelling requirement.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2-2015（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级），规定能效等级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量限值。该标准为强制性，由SAMR执行，中国能效标识（CEL）由NDRC/SAMR通过CNIS管理。中国测量采用GB/T 8059-2016，与IEC 62552系列对齐。由于蒙古能效计划同样参照IEC 62552测量基础，底层试验方法大体兼容，但中国1至5级及CEL不自动满足任何蒙古能效声明或标识要求。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2-2015（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級），規定能效等級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量限值。該標準為強制性，由SAMR執行，中國能效標識（CEL）由NDRC/SAMR通過CNIS管理。中國測量採用GB/T 8059-2016，與IEC 62552系列對齊。由於蒙古能效計劃同樣參照IEC 62552測量基礎，底層試驗方法大體兼容，但中國1至5級及CEL不自動滿足任何蒙古能效聲明或標識要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators （mandatory; enforced by SAMR/NDRC under China Energy Label system）
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances test method （aligned with IEC 62552 series）

gap.en: Two gaps apply: （1） Declaration / labelling format — China's CEL （1-to-5 grade） is not a Mongolian energy label; manufacturers must provide energy data in the format MASM / the importer requires and display any national energy label as required. Because both China （GB/T 8059） and Mongolia （MNS IEC 62552） use the IEC 62552 measurement basis, the underlying consumption figures should be transferable, reducing re-testing if the test report is accepted. （2） Threshold confirmation — the specific minimum-performance levels or programme thresholds set under Mongolia's national energy programmes should be confirmed for refrigerating appliances; these may differ from Chinese Grade values and from EAEU/EU levels. There is no EPREL-style pre-registration database, so the obligation is declaration plus any in-market label, not centralized database registration. Confirm the current requirements directly with MASM and the in-country importer.
gap.zh: 存在两项差距：（1）声明/标识格式——中国CEL（1至5级）不是蒙古能效标签；制造商须按MASM/进口商要求的格式提供能效数据，并按要求展示任何国家能效标签。由于中国（GB/T 8059）与蒙古（MNS IEC 62552）均使用IEC 62552测量基础，底层耗电量数据应可转用，若检测报告获接受可减少重新检测。（2）门槛确认——蒙古国家能效计划针对制冷器具设定的具体最低性能水平或计划门槛须予以确认；其可能不同于中国等级值及欧亚经济联盟/欧盟水平。无EPREL式预注册数据库，故义务为声明加任何市场内标签，而非集中式数据库注册。请直接向MASM及境内进口商确认现行要求。
gap.zht: 存在兩項差距：（1）聲明/標識格式——中國CEL（1至5級）不是蒙古能效標籤；製造商須按MASM/進口商要求的格式提供能效數據，並按要求展示任何國家能效標籤。由於中國（GB/T 8059）與蒙古（MNS IEC 62552）均使用IEC 62552測量基礎，底層耗電量數據應可轉用，若檢測報告獲接受可減少重新檢測。（2）門檻確認——蒙古國家能效計劃針對製冷器具設定的具體最低性能水平或計劃門檻須予以確認；其可能不同於中國等級值及歐亞經濟聯盟/歐盟水平。無EPREL式預登記數據庫，故義務為聲明加任何市場內標籤，而非集中式數據庫登記。請直接向MASM及境內進口商確認現行要求。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — energy-efficiency declaration/labelling expected under Mongolian national energy programmes and MASM administration; exact mandatory thresholds for refrigerating appliances should be confirmed with MASM
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 energy efficiency grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

source.publisher: MASM — Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mongolia addresses appliance energy efficiency through national energy programmes and MASM-administered MNS standards adopting the IEC 62552 measurement basis, not an EPREL-style database. Chinese GB 12021.2 grades and the China Energy Label do not automatically satisfy Mongolian requirements, but the shared IEC 62552 test basis means consumption data should be transferable. Confirm exact thresholds, declaration format, and any national label with MASM and the in-country importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 蒙古通过国家能效计划及MASM管理的、采用IEC 62552测量基础的MNS标准处理器具能效，而非EPREL式数据库。中国GB 12021.2等级及中国能效标识不自动满足蒙古要求，但共享的IEC 62552试验基础意味着耗电量数据应可转用。请向MASM及境内进口商确认具体门槛、声明格式及任何国家标签。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 蒙古通過國家能效計劃及MASM管理的、採用IEC 62552測量基礎的MNS標準處理器具能效，而非EPREL式數據庫。中國GB 12021.2等級及中國能效標識不自動滿足蒙古要求，但共享的IEC 62552試驗基礎意味著耗電量數據應可轉用。請向MASM及境內進口商確認具體門檻、聲明格式及任何國家標籤。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Labelling & Product Information — Mongolian Market Display Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标识与产品信息——蒙古市场展示要求
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標識與產品資訊——蒙古市場展示要求

summary.en: Where Mongolia's national energy programmes or MASM standards require an appliance energy label or product information disclosure, household refrigerating appliances should carry the prescribed energy information （typically energy class/grade, annual energy consumption in kWh, and compartment volumes） in the format set by MASM, together with Mongolian-language product information appropriate for the local market. Unlike the EU, Mongolia does not operate a centralized pre-registration database （no EPREL equivalent）; the obligation is point-of-sale information and label display as defined by the national programme, coordinated through the in-country importer. Test data underpinning the declared energy figures should be based on the IEC 62552 measurement series adopted into MNS. Manufacturers should align the declared model identifier, energy values, and any label artwork with the importer who places the product on the Mongolian market.
summary.zh: 在蒙古国家能效计划或MASM标准要求器具能效标签或产品信息披露的情况下，家用制冷器具须按MASM规定的格式标注规定的能效信息（通常为能效等级、年耗电量（千瓦时）及隔间容积），并附适合本地市场的蒙古语产品信息。与欧盟不同，蒙古不实行集中式预注册数据库（无EPREL对应物）；义务为按国家计划规定的销售点信息和标签展示，由境内进口商协调。支撑所声明能效数据的检测数据须基于纳入MNS的IEC 62552测量系列。制造商应与将产品投放蒙古市场的进口商就所声明的型号标识符、能效值及任何标签图案保持一致。
summary.zht: 在蒙古國家能效計劃或MASM標準要求器具能效標籤或產品資訊披露的情況下，家用製冷器具須按MASM規定的格式標注規定的能效資訊（通常為能效等級、年耗電量（千瓦時）及隔間容積），並附適合本地市場的蒙古語產品資訊。與歐盟不同，蒙古不實行集中式預登記數據庫（無EPREL對應物）；義務為按國家計劃規定的銷售點資訊和標籤展示，由境內進口商協調。支撐所聲明能效數據的檢測數據須基於納入MNS的IEC 62552測量系列。製造商應與將產品投放蒙古市場的進口商就所聲明的型號識別符、能效值及任何標籤圖案保持一致。

standards_or_laws: Mongolian national energy programmes — appliance energy information / labelling expectations at point of sale
MNS IEC 62552 series — measurement basis underpinning declared energy figures
MASM — administration of energy label format and product information requirements

summary.en: China's energy labelling for household refrigerators is governed by the China Energy Label （CEL） system under the Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels （NDRC/SAMR, 2016 revision）, displaying a 1-to-5 grade scale and annual energy consumption, administered via CNIS. Manufacturers self-declare the grade based on GB 12021.2 testing; there is no pre-registration database analogous to EPREL. The Chinese CEL is China-market-specific and is not recognised as a Mongolian energy label; for export to Mongolia, the importer must arrange any required Mongolian energy information/label, although the underlying IEC 62552-based test data should be reusable.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的能效标识依据《能源效率标识管理办法》（NDRC/SAMR，2016年修订版）的中国能效标识（CEL）体系实施，展示1至5级评级及年耗电量，由CNIS管理。制造商依据GB 12021.2检测自我声明等级；无类似EPREL的预注册数据库。中国CEL为中国市场专用，不被承认为蒙古能效标签；出口至蒙古时，进口商须安排任何所需的蒙古能效信息/标签，但底层基于IEC 62552的检测数据应可复用。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的能效標識依據《能源效率標識管理辦法》（NDRC/SAMR，2016年修訂版）的中國能效標識（CEL）體系實施，展示1至5級評級及年耗電量，由CNIS管理。製造商依據GB 12021.2檢測自我聲明等級；無類似EPREL的預登記數據庫。中國CEL為中國市場專用，不被承認為蒙古能效標籤；出口至蒙古時，進口商須安排任何所需的蒙古能效資訊/標籤，但底層基於IEC 62552的檢測數據應可複用。

standards_or_laws: Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels （NDRC/SAMR 2016 revision） — China Energy Label framework
GB 12021.2-2015 — underlying energy efficiency grade standard for household refrigerators

gap.en: The gap is a labelling/format and local-language gap rather than a measurement gap: （1） The Chinese CEL cannot be displayed as the Mongolian energy label; any required Mongolian energy information must follow the MASM/national-programme format, in Mongolian language as appropriate. （2） Product information （manuals, energy data, safety notices） should be provided in a form acceptable for the Mongolian market, coordinated through the in-country importer. （3） Because both markets rest on the IEC 62552 measurement series, the declared annual energy consumption figures should transfer without new testing, provided the test report is accepted. There is no EPREL-style database registration burden. The exact form and mandatory status of any Mongolian energy label for refrigerators should be confirmed with MASM and the importer before shipment.
gap.zh: 差距在于标识/格式及本地语言，而非测量：（1）中国CEL不能作为蒙古能效标签展示；任何所需的蒙古能效信息须遵循MASM/国家计划格式，并酌情使用蒙古语。（2）产品信息（说明书、能效数据、安全提示）须以蒙古市场可接受的形式提供，由境内进口商协调。（3）由于两个市场均基于IEC 62552测量系列，所声明的年耗电量数据应可在无需重新检测的情况下转用，前提是检测报告获接受。无EPREL式数据库注册负担。任何蒙古制冷器具能效标签的具体形式及强制状态，应在出货前向MASM及进口商确认。
gap.zht: 差距在於標識/格式及本地語言，而非測量：（1）中國CEL不能作為蒙古能效標籤展示；任何所需的蒙古能效資訊須遵循MASM/國家計劃格式，並酌情使用蒙古語。（2）產品資訊（說明書、能效數據、安全提示）須以蒙古市場可接受的形式提供，由境內進口商協調。（3）由於兩個市場均基於IEC 62552測量系列，所聲明的年耗電量數據應可在無需重新檢測的情況下轉用，前提是檢測報告獲接受。無EPREL式數據庫登記負擔。任何蒙古製冷器具能效標籤的具體形式及強制狀態，應在出貨前向MASM及進口商確認。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — energy information/label display per Mongolian national energy programme and MASM format where required; no centralized pre-registration database （no EPREL equivalent）
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label display required before sale in China under NDRC/SAMR Measures; based on GB 12021.2-2015

source.publisher: MASM — Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Any Mongolian energy label or product-information requirement is met through the MASM/national-programme format and Mongolian-language documentation arranged with the in-country importer — not via an EPREL-style database. The Chinese CEL does not satisfy this. Because both markets use the IEC 62552 measurement basis, the declared energy figures should transfer without re-testing. Confirm the exact label form and mandatory status with MASM and the importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 任何蒙古能效标签或产品信息要求，须通过MASM/国家计划格式及与境内进口商安排的蒙古语文件满足——而非通过EPREL式数据库。中国CEL不满足此要求。由于两个市场均使用IEC 62552测量基础，所声明的能效数据应可在无需重新检测的情况下转用。请向MASM及进口商确认标签的具体形式及强制状态。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 任何蒙古能效標籤或產品資訊要求，須通過MASM/國家計劃格式及與境內進口商安排的蒙古語文件滿足——而非通過EPREL式數據庫。中國CEL不滿足此要求。由於兩個市場均使用IEC 62552測量基礎，所聲明的能效數據應可在無需重新檢測的情況下轉用。請向MASM及進口商確認標籤的具體形式及強制狀態。
